caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white t-shirt and black headphones, is seated in a recording studio against a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He has tattoos on his right arm and is positioned in front of a silver professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, he rests his right hand on his forehead in a gesture of stress or contemplation. As the scene progresses, he shifts his gaze and slightly adjusts his head position while maintaining the hand-to-forehead posture. His white t-shirt features a logo on the chest with the text "Frithmung". The camera remains in a static close-up shot, capturing his facial expressions and the recording equipment as he looks slightly off-camera.
